sentence: 相对而言，坐地铁更省时间。
pinyin: Xiāngduì ér yán, zuò dìtiě gèng shěng shíjiān.
english: Relatively speaking, taking the subway saves more time.

sentence: 订房需要预付一晚的房费。
pinyin: Dìng fáng xūyào yùfù yī wǎn de fáng fèi.
english: Booking a room requires you to prepay one night's fee.

sentence: 这栋楼宇刚翻新完，看起来很新。
pinyin: Zhè dòng lóuyǔ gāng fānxīn wán, kàn qǐlái hěn xīn.
english: This building was just renovated and looks brand new.

sentence: 她买食品时会看有没有添加剂。
pinyin: Tā mǎi shípǐn shí huì kàn yǒu méiyǒu tiānjiājì.
english: She checks for additives when buying food.

sentence: 他在产房外面等了好几个小时。
pinyin: Tā zài chǎnfáng wàimiàn děngle hǎo jǐ gè xiǎoshí.
english: He waited outside the delivery room for several hours.

sentence: 她去医院挂了妇科的号。
pinyin: Tā qù yīyuàn guàle fùkē de hào.
english: She registered at the gynecology department at the hospital.

sentence: 他检查了一下自行车的飞轮。
pinyin: Tā jiǎnchále yīxià zìxíngchē de fēilún.
english: He checked the bicycle's freewheel.

sentence: 政府出资扶植本土新兴产业。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ chūzī fúzhí běntǔ xīnxīng chǎnyè.
english: The government funded support for local emerging industries.

sentence: 收银员扫了一下商品上的条形码。
pinyin: Shōuyínyuán sǎole yīxià shāngpǐn shàng de tiáoxíng mǎ.
english: The cashier scanned the barcode on the product.

sentence: 这辆自行车的车架是碳纤维做的。
pinyin: Zhè liàng zìxíngchē de chējià shì tàn xiānwéi zuò de.
english: This bicycle's frame is made of carbon fiber.

meaning: 1. random inspection; 2. to do a spot check
sentence: 质检员随机抽查了几批产品。
pinyin: Zhìjiǎnyuán suíjī chōuchále jǐ pī chǎnpǐn.
english: The inspector did a random spot check on several batches of products.

sentence: 这款软件的本地化工作做得很好。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn ruǎnjiàn de běndìhuà gōngzuò zuò de hěn hǎo.
english: The localization of this software was done very well.

sentence: 动物园里新来了一头海象。
pinyin: Dòngwùyuán lǐ xīn láile yī tóu hǎixiàng.
english: A new walrus arrived at the zoo.

sentence: 孩子们放学后去足球场踢球。
pinyin: Háizimen fàngxué hòu qù zúqiúchǎng tī qiú.
english: The kids went to the soccer field to play after school.

sentence: 他觉得自己的词汇量有些贫乏。
pinyin: Tā juéde zìjǐ de cíhuì liàng yǒuxiē pínfá.
english: He feels his vocabulary is somewhat limited.

sentence: 她今天在赶时间，没法多聊。
pinyin: Tā jīntiān zài gǎn shíjiān, méifǎ duō liáo.
english: She's in a hurry today and can't chat for long.

sentence: 科学家用射电望远镜观测星系。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā yòng shèdiàn wàngyuǎnjìng guāncè xīnghé.
english: Scientists use radio telescopes to observe galaxies.

meaning: 1. chang pao (traditional Chinese men's robe); 2. gown; 3. robe;
sentence: 爷爷珍藏着一件老式长袍。
pinyin: Yéye zhēncángzhe yī jiàn lǎoshì cháng páo.
english: Grandpa treasures an old-style traditional robe.

meaning: 1. realism (in art); 2. sense of reality; 3. texture; 4. tactile quali
sentence: 这件衬衫的质感非常好，很舒服。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn chènshān de zhìgǎn fēicháng hǎo, hěn shūfu.
english: The texture of this shirt is excellent and very comfortable.

sentence: 摄影师调整了光源的角度。
pinyin: Shèyǐngshī tiáozhěngle guāngyuán de jiǎodù.
english: The photographer adjusted the angle of the light source.

sentence: 傍晚的湖边充满了诗意。
pinyin: Bàngwǎn de hú biān chōngmǎnle shīyì.
english: The lakeside at dusk is full of poetic charm.

meaning: 1. illegal immigration; 2. to stowaway (on a ship); 3. to steal across
sentence: 他曾试图偷渡到另一个国家。
pinyin: Tā céng shìtú tōudù dào lìng yī gè guójiā.
english: He once tried to illegally cross into another country.

sentence: 这个地区经常发生自然灾害。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū jīngcháng fāshēng zìrán zāihài.
english: Natural disasters occur frequently in this region.

sentence: 老教授学识渊博，大家都很敬佩他。
pinyin: Lǎo jiàoshòu xuéshí yuānbó, dàjiā dōu hěn jìngpèi tā.
english: The old professor is vastly knowledgeable and everyone admires him.

meaning: 1. doctoral degree; 2. PhD; 3. same as Doctor of Philosophy 哲學博士學位|哲学博
sentence: 她花了五年时间拿到博士学位。
pinyin: Tā huāle wǔ nián shíjiān ná dào bóshì xuéwèi.
english: She spent five years earning her doctoral degree.

sentence: 这个粒子带有负电荷。
pinyin: Zhège lìzǐ dài yǒu fù diànhè.
english: This particle carries a negative electric charge.

sentence: 她买了一件深红色的外套。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī jiàn shēnhóngsè de wàitào.
english: She bought a deep red coat.

sentence: 老板听到消息后雷霆大怒。
pinyin: Lǎobǎn tīng dào xiāoxi hòu léitíng dà nù.
english: The boss flew into a thunderous rage when he heard the news.

sentence: 路旁种着一排高大的梧桐树。
pinyin: Lù páng zhòngzhe yī pái gāodà de wútóng shù.
english: A row of tall plane trees is planted along the roadside.

sentence: 大家都觉得他是个人渣。
pinyin: Dàjiā dōu juéde tā shì gè rénzhā.
english: Everyone thinks he is scum.

sentence: 这座核电站有两个反应堆。
pinyin: Zhè zuò hédiànzhàn yǒu liǎng gè fǎnyìngduī.
english: This nuclear power plant has two reactors.

meaning: 1. to include; 2. to embrace; 3. to bring together
sentence: 这本书囊括了各种烹饪技巧。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū nángkuòle gè zhǒng pēngrèn jìqiǎo.
english: This book covers all kinds of cooking techniques.

sentence: 工人们正在粉刷大楼的外墙。
pinyin: Gōngrénmen zhèngzài fěnshuā dàlóu de wàiqiáng.
english: Workers are painting the exterior wall of the building.

sentence: 故事里的小精灵帮助了迷路的孩子。
pinyin: Gùshi lǐ de xiǎo jīnglíng bāngzhùle mílù de háizi.
english: The elf in the story helped the lost child.

sentence: 这个决定太短视了，只看到眼前的利益。
pinyin: Zhège juédìng tài duǎnshì le, zhǐ kàn dào yǎnqián de lìyì.
english: This decision is too shortsighted, only looking at immediate gains.

sentence: 多运动可以减低患病的风险。
pinyin: Duō yùndòng kěyǐ jiǎndī huànbìng de fēngxiǎn.
english: Exercising more can reduce the risk of getting sick.

sentence: 我们买了爆米花准备看电影。
pinyin: Wǒmen mǎile bàomǐhuā zhǔnbèi kàn diànyǐng.
english: We bought popcorn to get ready to watch the movie.

sentence: 朋友们来参观他们的新居。
pinyin: Péngyǒumen lái cānguān tāmen de xīnjū.
english: Friends came to visit their new home.

sentence: 经理让副手负责安排这次活动。
pinyin: Jīnglǐ ràng fùshǒu fùzé ānpái zhè cì huódòng.
english: The manager had the assistant take charge of organizing this event.

sentence: 这支球队的凝聚力很强。
pinyin: Zhè zhī qiúduì de níngjùlì hěn qiáng.
english: This team has very strong cohesion.

sentence: 他提出了一个有趣的悖论让大家思考。
pinyin: Tā tíchūle yī gè yǒuqù de bèilùn ràng dàjiā sīkǎo.
english: He posed an interesting paradox for everyone to think about.

sentence: 他后来才知道自己是个私生子。
pinyin: Tā hòulái cái zhīdào zìjǐ shì gè sīshēngzǐ.
english: He only found out later that he was an illegitimate son.

meaning: 1. native soil; 2. one's native land; 3. one's hometown; 4.
sentence: 他的小说充满了浓厚的乡土气息。
pinyin: Tā de xiǎoshuō chōngmǎn le nónghòu de xiāngtǔ qìxī.
english: His novels are full of a strong local flavor.

sentence: 动物园里有一只山猫。
pinyin: Dòngwùyuán lǐ yǒu yī zhī shānmāo.
english: There is a lynx at the zoo.

meaning: 1. to provoke; 2. to entice; 3. to lure; 4. to tantalize; 5. to tease;
sentence: 他喜欢挑逗小狗玩。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān tiǎodòu xiǎogǒu wán.
english: He likes to tease the puppy.

meaning: 1. to become fashionable; 2. to catch on; 3. to be popular
sentence: 这种短视频在年轻人中非常风行。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng duǎn shìpín zài niánqīngrén zhōng fēicháng fēngxíng.
english: This type of short video is very popular among young people.

sentence: 居里夫人发现了放射性元素镭。
pinyin: Jūlǐ fūrén fāxiàn le fàngshèxìng yuánsù léi.
english: Madame Curie discovered the radioactive element radium.

meaning: 1. main key (of a musical composition); 2. keynote (speech)
sentence: 会议的基调是鼓励创新。
pinyin: Huìyì de jīdiào shì gǔlì chuàngxīn.
english: The keynote of the meeting was to encourage innovation.

meaning: 1. to shift (funds); 2. to (legitimately) take funds set aside for one
sentence: 他因为挪用公款被公司开除了。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi nuóyòng gōngkuǎn bèi gōngsī kāichú le.
english: He was fired from the company for misappropriating public funds.

sentence: 很多人在经济危机中失去了工作。
pinyin: Hěn duō rén zài jīngjì wēijī zhōng shīqù le gōngzuò.
english: Many people lost their jobs during the economic crisis.
